title: Missing & New Potions
body:
![about](https://i.imgur.com/VOVty3z.png)
###  Missing & New Potions

Is a mod that adds potions with effect that dont have a potion in vanila minecraft 

and adds new potions and effects!

![missing potions](https://i.imgur.com/Fq6gV5l.png)

-Absorption  = regenration+glowstone dust

-Bad omen = thick+crossbow

-Blindness = invisibilty+fse

-Conduit power = mundane+conduit

-Darkness = blindness+fse

-Dolophins grace = water breathing+fse

-Glowing = awkward+glowstone dust

-Haste = awkward+iron picaxe

-Health boost = healing+glowstone dust

-Hero of the villagethick+emerald

-Hungerwater bottle+rotten flesh

-Levition = awkward+shulker shell

-Mining fatigue = haste+fse

-Nausea = awkward+pufferfish

-Saturation = awkward+suspicious stew

-Uncraftble = water botter+enchanting table

-Unluck = luck+fse

-Wither = posion+fse

-Resistance = any type of armor+thick

-Raid Omen = bad omen+copper

-Trial Omen = bad omen+emerald

Luck = awkward+fishing rod

![new potions](https://i.imgur.com/jNeJFfl.png)

Admin = uncrafteble potion+fajse

Nightmare = moon+fse

Moon = awkward+moon stone

Instant Death = nightmare+fse

INSTANT Regeneration = health boost+fajse

Dice = water bottle+fajse

A Lot Of Dices = dice+glowstone

Creative = water bottle+silence armor trim

Survival = water bottle+grass block

Adventure = water bottle+empty map

Spectator = water bottle+eye of ender

Grenade = water bottle+tnt

Miner = awkward+diamond picaxe

Flying = mundane+end crystal

Ireland = water+potato

Inventory Bomb(ebomb for short.) = grenade+tnt

Small Bleeding = thick+iron sword

Large Bleeding = smallbleeding+glowstone

LAG = uncraftble potion+suspicious sand

Nasty Treat = water bottle+poisonous potato

Yummy Treat = water bottle+baked potato

Berserk = water bottle+uncraftble potion

Gravity Off = moon+glowstone dust

Gravity On = gravity off+fajse

Milk = glass bottle+milk bucket

Permenant Flying = flying+end crystal

Pernenant Creative = creative+silence armor trim

Fish = water bottle+tropical fish

Player = water bottle+oak sapling

Lightning in a bottle = water bottle+lightnig rod

TNT = water bottle+tnt

Pencil = water bottle+glowstone

Delete = awkward+anvil

Trash = thick+cactus

Scaffold = hack+gold ingot

Andromeda = hack+diamond

Andromeda Practice = thick+glowstone

Hi Nether = thick+netherrack

Hi Overworld = thick+grass block

Hi End = thick+endstone

Fast Falling = thick+anvil

Hard Vision = night vision+fse

Earthquake = thick+magma block

Slow Jumping = jump boost+fse

Farlands = awkward+smooth basalt

Void Breathing = uncraftable potion+cobbled deepslate

Spawn = water bottle+white bed

Sus = awkward+report button

Bedwars = water bottle+diamond

Brithday = water bottle+cake

Blackhole= thick+singularity

Terarium = water bottle+moss block

Fire = water+fire

Sleep = awkward+any beds

Hi Moon = thick+moon stone

Hi Blackhole = thick+singularity

Trick Or Potion = water+any candy

Turkey Bomb = awkward+turkey feather

Hi North Pole = thick+snow block

Red Gift = water+red gift

![other stuff](https://i.imgur.com/4zEaq1Q.png)

and added the recipe of potion of luck and all of the potions added

some of the potion recipes don't make sense like using items that don't make sense

the letters next to the added potions and the = sign are the recipe of that potion, 

and the first one is the one is the potion slot and the second one is the one that goes in the ingredient slot,

and fse = fermented spider eye, fajse = fresh and juicy spider eye

New potions

-comment your potion ideas!(in mcreator or curseforge)

   -if there is more info like duration if its instant or if its bad or beneficial ill add it but if not ill just chose by my self

Have fun testing!

(Neoforge doesn't import the workspace)

![links](https://i.imgur.com/c5SEIII.png)

([Mcreator](https://mcreator.net/modification/105915/missing-potions),[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/missing-new-potions),[Devblog](https://thesquarepack.wordpress.com))
